title: Watch the Aurora
description: Pick a safe aurora window, pack red light and layers, and log what you spot.

dialogue.text: Solar winds may trigger auroras tonight. We'll run a safe watch plan first so cold and darkness don't become the real hazard.

options.text: I'll check forecast, clouds, and travel safety before heading out.

dialogue.text: Check Kp forecast, cloud cover, and road conditions. Pick a dark spot with clear exits and a check-in plan.

options.text: Forecast logged; let's choose the observing path.

dialogue.text: If clouds are light and roads are safe, proceed to field observation. Otherwise run an indoor prep + alert plan so you can re-attempt the next window.

options.text: Conditions are safe enough to deploy now.
Conditions are poor; I'll stage a fallback session.

dialogue.text: Layer up, clip your red flashlight, text a buddy your site and return time, and keep the logbook in a dry pouch.

options.text: Kit packed and buddy check-in sent.

dialogue.text: Let eyes adjust, scan north for arcs or curtains, and record time, color, and direction while keeping footing stable.

options.text: Observation logged with color and direction.
No visible aurora yet or cloud is rolling in.

dialogue.text: Good call. Stay warm, set an alert for the next high-Kp hour, and pre-fill your log template so the next clear window is usable.

options.text: Fallback plan set; waiting for a better window.

dialogue.text: Troubleshoot before giving up: move 500 m away from local lights, reassess clouds in 20 minutes, and recheck your northern horizon safety path.

options.text: I adjusted location/timing and will retry this session.

dialogue.text: Follow-up check: if the sky clears, return to active observing. If not, keep the next alert and preserve energy for another night.

options.text: No safe window tonight; follow-up session is scheduled.

dialogue.text: Interpret your evidence: match observed colors and motion to forecast intensity and note whether your site selection improved visibility.

options.text: Interpretation added to the log and safety notes updated.

dialogue.text: Solid aurora operations. Warm up, confirm your check-in, and keep this log for future storm comparisons.

options.text: Session complete and follow-up plan noted.
